reviews.review_description:
I have never seen  this gameplay
I hope i can compete the score with others. 
The suspect makes me nervous sometimes
Nice approach.

reviews.review_title: Great for a quick adrenalin rush!
reviews.review_description:
This game is a gem. It is simple and yet put together in a way that just makes VR experience enjoyable. 
Unlike how overwhelming recent games have become, this game gives me a quick adrenaline fix, and it definitely is keeping its spot in my library. Try using objects instead of the weapons given. It's silly but fun.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the comment! Hope you enjoyed it.
